ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "tx_price" REAL /* Transaction price of the property */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "baths" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "sqft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "lot_size" INTEGER /* Size of the lot */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., Apartment, Condo, Townhouse) */,
  "exterior_walls" TEXT /* Material used for exterior walls */,
  "roof" TEXT /* Type of roof */,
  "basement" INTEGER /* Presence of a basement (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Last date the property was sold */,
  "last_sold_price" REAL /* Last price the property was sold for */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "heating" TEXT /* Type of heating system */,
  "cooling" TEXT /* Type of cooling system */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Number of garage spaces (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "pool" INTEGER /* Presence of a pool (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "view" TEXT /* Type of view (e.g., ocean, mountain, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the neighborhood */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value in the neighborhood */,
  "median_rent" REAL /* Median rent in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "avg_income" REAL /* Average income in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the amenity is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., restaurants, groceries, nightlife) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of amenities of this type in the neighborhood */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the specific amenity (e.g., Starbucks, Walmart) */,
  "amenity_address" TEXT /* Address of the amenity */,
  "amenity_rating" REAL /* Rating of the amenity (out of 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood to which this data point belongs */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the population */,
  "married" INTEGER /* Percentage of married population */,
  "college_grad" INTEGER /* Percentage of college graduates */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population */,
  "racial_diversity" TEXT /* Racial diversity metrics */,
  "gender_ratio" TEXT /* Gender ratio metrics */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school district */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood served by this district */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the school district (out of 10) */,
  "total_schools" INTEGER /* Total number of schools in the district */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment in the district */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_districts_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school district to which this school belongs */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., elementary, middle, high) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the school (out of 10) */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Student-to-teacher ratio */,
  "test_scores" TEXT /* Average test scores (e.g., 85% of students meet or exceed standards) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES school_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the real estate agent */,
  "mortgage" REAL /* Amount of mortgage taken for the purchase */,
  "closing_costs" REAL /* Total closing costs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being taxed */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the tax is being paid */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax paid */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied */,
  "assessed_value" REAL /* Assessed value of the property */,
  "tax_exemptions" TEXT /* Any tax exemptions applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_taxes_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance policy */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being insured */,
  "policy_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was issued */,
  "premium" REAL /* Annual premium for the policy */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., fire, flood, earthquake) */,
  "insurer" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "policy_term" INTEGER /* Length of the policy term in years */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Deductible amount for the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, query) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_property" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id", "property_id")
)
